Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$pptxPath = 'C:\\Users\\jsber\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Claude_task\\youtube-slides\\日本人の起源_遺伝学\\japanese_origin_genetics_slides.pptx'
\\$outDir = 'C:\\Users\\jsber\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Claude_task\\youtube-slides\\日本人の起源_遺伝学\\slides'
if \(!\(Test-Path \\$outDir\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path \\$outDir | Out-Null }
\\$ppt = New-Object -ComObject PowerPoint.Application
\\$ppt.Visible = [Microsoft.Office.Core.MsoTriState]::msoTrue
\\$presentation = \\$ppt.Presentations.Open\(\\$pptxPath\)
for \(\\$i = 1; \\$i -le \\$presentation.Slides.Count; \\$i++\) {
    \\$jpgPath = Join-Path \\$outDir \('slide_{0:D2}.jpg' -f \\$i\)
    \\$presentation.Slides[\\$i].Export\(\\$jpgPath, 'JPG', 1920, 1080\)
    Write-Output \\"Exported slide \\$i\\"
}
\\$presentation.Close\(\)
\\$ppt.Quit\(\)
[System.Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\(\\$ppt\) | Out-Null
Write-Output 'Done'
" 2>&1)
